[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000011 4
1 1100100010 4
2 1001101110 6
3 0111000000 3
4 1110100000 4
5 1111111111 a
6 1111111111 a
7 1111111111 a

23 1001111111 8
34 1111111111 a match 5 6 7
